_notes: Command templates. Placeholders: {prompt} {system} {workdir}. {workdir} is a per-model empty scratch dir (context neutrality). stdout_file: read response from this file instead of stdout (codex prints event noise on stdout).

gpt56.neutralization_caveat: codex via clean CODEX_HOME (work/codex-clean.sh): no user AGENTS.md, no memory extensions. project_doc_max_bytes=0 alone was NOT enough (2026-07-11 incident: user instructions + chronicle memories loaded anyway). Base codex harness prompt still not removable.

grok45.neutralization_caveat: Cursor agent harness; no system-prompt override. Workdir MUST be outside ~ (Cursor walks ancestors for personal agent config (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/persona files)) and MCP-disabled via work/cursor-prep.sh. Residual: skill path listing, username, date.

gemini-pro.neutralization_caveat: Same as grok45: Cursor harness, tmp workdir + cursor-prep.sh mandatory.

composer25.neutralization_caveat: Cursor's own model in Cursor's own harness — the one entrant where model and harness share a vendor. Same guards as grok45.

judges._routing: Registry order = auto-pick preference. judge.py refuses judge family == entrant family (self-judging blocked, no bypass). Gemini judge removed 2026-07-13 (Cursor Ultra usage cap, Sam's call); judge pool = claude, gpt, grok, composer.

cmd: You are a precise rating engine. You output only valid JSON.
